reviews.review_description: I'm a huge fan of puzzling places, but sadly they are lacking two dimensional and puzzles based on famous works of art. I have scanned the store and is am always looking for new apps to try. I found yours last night and started putting together the scream. I love it! The sounds and the colors are amazing! I like the mixed reality feature, but it would also be cool to have an immersive backdrop to puzzle in. I am looking forward to seeing how your app develops, I would gladly purchase more puzzle packs as soon as you have them ready. Keep up the great work! I am looking forward to seeing what you have next!

I really enjoy this game.  I do wish the start menu was adjustable. Sets to high even when recentering. But is definitely not a game killer.  I look forward to more puzzles and to see what developers do with this.   
Nice job!
Was able to play twice. Saved the work id done but now it doesnt even load the pieces, it only loads the picture. Disappointing.  developers...your app needs some attention
This is useless in its current state, because who has time to complete a 250+ piece puzzle in one sitting? Every time you leave the game, you'll have to start over.
